## Definition of Done
- [ ] All acceptance criteria met (binary pass/fail — no "mostly done")
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] `ruff check sidecar/` passes
- [ ] `mypy sidecar/ --ignore-missing-imports` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] CI green on this branch
- [ ] No photo files read, written, moved, or deleted
- [ ] No hardcoded ports, paths, or credentials
